rows: Interface that all concrete products must implement
Base class; declares the factory method and contains business logic
Subclass that overrides the factory method to return a specific product

content.body:
### The 4 Roles Visualized

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ         в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ    Product      в”Ӯ         в”Ӯ    Creator      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  (interface)    в”Ӯ         в”Ӯ  (abstract)     в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө         в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ + operation()   в”Ӯ         в”Ӯ + factoryMethod()в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–Ів”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ         в”Ӯ + someOperation()в”Ӯ
         в”Ӯ                  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–Ів”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
         в”Ӯ                           в”Ӯ
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ         в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ ConcreteProductAв”Ӯ         в”Ӯ ConcreteCreatorAв”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө         в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ + operation()   в”Ӯ         в”Ӯ + factoryMethod()в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ         в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

The factory method does **not** have to create a new instance every time. It can return an object from a **cache**, an **object pool**, or any other existing source вҖ” the client never knows the difference.

content.title: The 4 Roles in Code

flashcards.q: What are the four participants in the Factory Method pattern?
flashcards.a: **Product** (interface), **Concrete Product** (implementation), **Creator** (declares factory method + business logic), **Concrete Creator** (overrides factory method to return specific product).

flashcards.q: What is the only place in the Factory Method pattern where concrete class names appear?
flashcards.a: In the application's initialization/configuration code вҖ” the single location that reads config and instantiates the correct Concrete Creator. Everywhere else uses only abstract types.

flashcards.q: Can the factory method return an existing object instead of creating a new one?
flashcards.a: Yes. The factory method can return objects from a cache, an object pool, or any other source. The client doesn't know or care if it received a brand-new or recycled instance.

problems.a:
- `Notification` = Product
- `EmailNotification` = Concrete Product
- `Notifier` = Creator
- `EmailNotifier` = Concrete Creator
problems.hint: Look at what each class inherits from and what methods it defines.

problems.q: Why must the Creator's factory method return the Product interface type?
problems.a: So that the business logic in Creator can work with any Concrete Product without knowing which one it is. The client code also only knows the Product interface, keeping everything loosely coupled.
problems.hint: What would happen if the factory method returned a Concrete Product type directly?
